about.title: Technology built in Costa Rica
about.body: Pacific Code Labs was born from the conviction that technology must solve real problems. We are a team of Costa Rican engineers and designers who build digital products with identity, purpose, and technical excellence.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Ancestral principles applied to modern technology.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Technology solutions designed to transform industries.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Technical capabilities at the service of your organization.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and let's find the best solution together.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Message sent. We will be in touch soon.
contact.error: Could not send the message. Please try again.

admin.title: Administration Panel

media.title: Media Library
media.subtitle: Upload images, video and audio, or link external media.
media.emptyHint: Upload media from your computer or add an external URL.
media.emptyKinds: No matching media yet. Upload one or add it on the Media page.
media.uploadUnavailable: Upload needs the local dev server.

identity.title: Site Identity
identity.subtitle: Logo, favicon, name and brand colours — all editable and published with the site.
identity.logoHint: Used in the navbar, footer and admin. Transparent PNG/SVG recommended.
identity.faviconHint: Browser tab icon. Applied after save / reload.
identity.themeHint: The active theme's colours drive the live site. Changes preview instantly.

admin.unsavedBody: You have unsaved edits on this page. Save them before leaving, or discard them?
admin.autoTranslateHint: When you finish a field, translate it into the other language if empty.
admin.autoTranslateUnsupported: Translation unavailable in this browser (use desktop Chrome).
admin.contactDeliveryHint: No server (GitHub Pages): messages are delivered through an external service. A local copy is always kept.

notFound.title: This page got lost at sea
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved. Let's get you back on course.
